title: Tower T80352 Cerasure 28cm Fry Pan with Non-Stick Coating, Suitable for all Hob Types, Graphite
features: 28CM FRYING PAN: Constructed from high-quality aluminium, this 28cm frying pan is a great all round size for all frying tasks, from tasteful stir-fry dishes to cheesy omelettes
NON-STICK COATING: The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating is 3x stronger than others. Little oil is required for healthier eating, while the coating ensures food does not stick to the pan
BONDED BASE: Heating evenly with no hot spots, the robust bonded steel base provides even heat distribution, ensuring food is cooked thoroughly and evenly
SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES: For cooking versatility, the frying pan is compatible with all hob types, including induction
FREE FROM CHEMICALS: Its Cerasure coating is PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, lead and cadmium free – ideal for any avid cook
SOFTTEX HANDLE: The sturdy Softtex handle with ergonomic, phenolic design stays cool to touch for a comfortable grip while cooking and serving
DISHWASHER SAFE: For added convenience, place the pan into the dishwasher to clean. Hand wash recommended to maintain the finish
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T80352 Cerasure 28cm Fry Pan with Non-Stick Coating, Suitable for all Hob Types Same flavoursome meals with less oil – Cerasure cookware collection is suitable for any cook The Cerasure 24cm Frying Pan by Tower is ideal for any avid cook. The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating requires little oil for healthier cooking whilst preventing food sticking to the pan. Cerasure ceramic coating is PFAS, PFAO, PTFE, lead and cadmium free. The bonded steel base heats evenly and is suitable for all hob types, including induction. The ergonomic, Softtex handle stays cool to touch for a comfortable grip. For convenience, the pan is dishwasher safe, although hand wash recommended 28cm Frying Pan Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating Dishwasher suitable – hand wash recommended Suitable for all hob types, including induction PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead and Cadmium free Graphite heat resistant exterior coating Do not use in the oven or grill Item dimensions: H5cm x W28cm x D28cm 28CM FRYING PAN Constructed from high-quality aluminium, this 28cm frying pan is a great all round size for all frying tasks, from tasteful stir-fry dishes to cheesy omelettes BONDED BASE Heating evenly with no hot spots, the robust bonded steel base provides even heat distribution, ensuring food is cooked thoroughly and evenly NON-STICK COATING The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating is 3x stronger than others.
